claim_paraphrase: BigQuery federated query plans show operations pushed down to the external data source.
BigQuery join-step documentation describes join-key shuffling for large joins and skew diagnostics.
BigQuery can modify a query plan while running by introducing repartition stages.
BigQuery stage overview reports records, parallel inputs, and shuffle output/spill bytes.
BigQuery API represents plans as stages and console execution graph shows stages and shuffle edges.
With join_algorithm=auto, ClickHouse can switch from hash join to partial merge join at runtime when memory limits are violated.
DuckDB CTE inlining requires single reference, no volatile function, NOT MATERIALIZED, and no grouped aggregation.
DuckDB handles CTEs as materialized by default but may inline under documented heuristics.
EXPLAIN reports estimated startup/total cost, output rows, width, and planner-specific arbitrary cost units.
The rows estimate is emitted rows rather than scanned rows.
When too many input tables are present, PostgreSQL switches from exhaustive search to GEQO probabilistic search.
For simple inner joins, the planner can explore alternative semantically equivalent join orders, with exponential search growth.
Setting join_collapse_limit to 1 can force explicit JOIN order constraints.
Outer join semantics can constrain join-order freedom; FULL JOIN fully constrains order.
Snowflake EXPLAIN returns the logical execution plan for a SQL statement.
Snowflake EXPLAIN compiles but does not execute the SQL statement.
Snowflake notes actual execution order need not match logical plan order.
Spark AQE uses runtime statistics to choose an execution plan and can re-optimize during execution.
Spark AQE can coalesce post-shuffle partitions using map-output statistics.
Spark documents runtime statistics as part of adaptive query execution and exposes them in SQL UI.
Spark AQE can convert sort-merge join to broadcast hash join based on runtime side-size statistics.
Aggregation pushdown does not support expressions inside aggregate calls.
Aggregation pushdown is guarded by connector support, function support, and query structure.
Trino documents partitioned and broadcast join distribution and automatic cost-based distribution selection.
Cost-based join enumeration uses connector-provided table statistics and falls back when statistics/costs are unavailable.
When automatic join enumeration lacks statistics or computable costs, Trino uses the eliminate-cross-joins strategy.
Join pushdown delegates join execution to the source under same-catalog and pushdownable-predicate guards.
Limit pushdown is connector-specific and delegates unsorted LIMIT processing to the source.
Predicate pushdown delegates row filtering to the data source and affects EXPLAIN operator visibility.
Projection pushdown delegates column access reduction to the connector/source.
Top-N pushdown is distinct from limit pushdown and depends on connector syntax and capabilities.
BigQuery query-plan statistics expose aggregation stage details and shuffle sizes.
segment_text: BigQuery query-plan statistics expose aggregation stage details and shuffle sizes.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery Cloud SQL federated queries do not support aggregation pushdowns.
segment_text: BigQuery Cloud SQL federated queries do not support aggregation pushdowns.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery Cloud SQL federated queries support only column pruning and filter pushdowns among listed pushdown types.
segment_text: BigQuery Cloud SQL federated queries support only column pruning and filter pushdowns among listed pushdown types.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery Cloud SQL federated queries do not support join pushdowns.
segment_text: BigQuery Cloud SQL federated queries do not support join pushdowns.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery Cloud SQL federated queries do not support limit or order-by pushdowns.
segment_text: BigQuery Cloud SQL federated queries do not support limit or order-by pushdowns.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery federated SQL pushdowns can rewrite an EXTERNAL_QUERY so only selected columns/rows are returned.
segment_text: BigQuery federated SQL pushdowns can rewrite an EXTERNAL_QUERY so only selected columns/rows are returned.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery query plans show pushdowns applied to federated queries.
segment_text: BigQuery query plans show pushdowns applied to federated queries.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery query-plan steps include FILTER operations for WHERE/HAVING clauses.
segment_text: BigQuery query-plan steps include FILTER operations for WHERE/HAVING clauses.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery partition pruning behavior differs for AND versus OR predicates; OR can prevent pruning.
segment_text: BigQuery partition pruning behavior differs for AND versus OR predicates; OR can prevent pruning.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery partition pruning requires isolating the partitioning column or using supported built-in functions.
segment_text: BigQuery partition pruning requires isolating the partitioning column or using supported built-in functions.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery query-plan steps include READ operations from tables or shuffle and expose scan-related information.
segment_text: BigQuery query-plan steps include READ operations from tables or shuffle and expose scan-related information.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery can modify a query plan while running and introduce repartition stages.
segment_text: BigQuery can modify a query plan while running and introduce repartition stages.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery search indexes are not used for queries against external tables or when a query references materialized views.
segment_text: BigQuery search indexes are not used for queries against external tables or when a query references materialized views.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery Spanner external datasets support compute and partial aggregate pushdowns but not join, limit, or order pushdowns.
segment_text: BigQuery Spanner external datasets support compute and partial aggregate pushdowns but not join, limit, or order pushdowns.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery API query plans list stages, and the execution graph shows stages and shuffle-memory edges.
segment_text: BigQuery API query plans list stages, and the execution graph shows stages and shuffle-memory edges.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery WRITE steps commonly write intermediate results to shuffle memory.
segment_text: BigQuery WRITE steps commonly write intermediate results to shuffle memory.

claim_paraphrase: ClickHouse auto/hash-style joins can convert to grace hash join to spill data under memory pressure.
segment_text: ClickHouse auto/hash-style joins can convert to grace hash join to spill data under memory pressure.

claim_paraphrase: ClickHouse has a setting that supports join table sides swapping based on size.
segment_text: ClickHouse has a setting that supports join table sides swapping based on size.

claim_paraphrase: ClickHouse direct join can push filters to the storage layer and uses the primary key index.
segment_text: ClickHouse direct join can push filters to the storage layer and uses the primary key index.

claim_paraphrase: ClickHouse can use direct join when the right table supports key-value lookup, such as dictionaries or embedded key-value stores.
segment_text: ClickHouse can use direct join when the right table supports key-value lookup, such as dictionaries or embedded key-value stores.

claim_paraphrase: ClickHouse full sorting merge join can skip sorting when table physical row order matches the join key.
segment_text: ClickHouse full sorting merge join can skip sorting when table physical row order matches the join key.

claim_paraphrase: ClickHouse grace_hash join provides a non-memory-bound join algorithm by splitting data into buckets and spilling.
segment_text: ClickHouse grace_hash join provides a non-memory-bound join algorithm by splitting data into buckets and spilling.

claim_paraphrase: ClickHouse hash join loads the right table into memory and supports multiple join types and strictness modes.
segment_text: ClickHouse hash join loads the right table into memory and supports multiple join types and strictness modes.

claim_paraphrase: ClickHouse join_algorithm setting allows selecting join algorithms explicitly.
segment_text: ClickHouse join_algorithm setting allows selecting join algorithms explicitly.

claim_paraphrase: With join_algorithm=auto, ClickHouse tries hash join first and switches to partial merge join at runtime if memory is violated.
segment_text: With join_algorithm=auto, ClickHouse tries hash join first and switches to partial merge join at runtime if memory is violated.

claim_paraphrase: ClickHouse automatically reorders two-table joins since version 24.12.
segment_text: ClickHouse automatically reorders two-table joins since version 24.12.

claim_paraphrase: ClickHouse supports automatic reordering for joins with three or more tables since version 25.9.
segment_text: ClickHouse supports automatic reordering for joins with three or more tables since version 25.9.

claim_paraphrase: ClickHouse parallel_hash join splits data into buckets and builds hash tables concurrently to speed up the process.
segment_text: ClickHouse parallel_hash join splits data into buckets and builds hash tables concurrently to speed up the process.

claim_paraphrase: ClickHouse partial_merge join sorts the right table into blocks and dumps sorted blocks to disk.
segment_text: ClickHouse partial_merge join sorts the right table into blocks and dumps sorted blocks to disk.

claim_paraphrase: ClickHouse attempts to push down conditions to all join clauses and subqueries, though manual pushdown may still be needed.
segment_text: ClickHouse attempts to push down conditions to all join clauses and subqueries, though manual pushdown may still be needed.

claim_paraphrase: DuckDB handles CTEs as materialized by default, evaluating the CTE once into a temporary table.
segment_text: DuckDB handles CTEs as materialized by default, evaluating the CTE once into a temporary table.

claim_paraphrase: DuckDB materialization evaluates a CTE once and stores the result for reuse.
segment_text: DuckDB materialization evaluates a CTE once and stores the result for reuse.

claim_paraphrase: DuckDB may decide whether to materialize or inline a CTE based on query structure and heuristics.
segment_text: DuckDB may decide whether to materialize or inline a CTE based on query structure and heuristics.

claim_paraphrase: DuckDB can inline a CTE if it is referenced once, contains no volatile function, uses NOT MATERIALIZED, and has no grouped aggregation.
segment_text: DuckDB can inline a CTE if it is referenced once, contains no volatile function, uses NOT MATERIALIZED, and has no grouped aggregation.

claim_paraphrase: DuckDB supports AS MATERIALIZED to force materialization of a CTE.
segment_text: DuckDB supports AS MATERIALIZED to force materialization of a CTE.

claim_paraphrase: DuckDB CTE inlining heuristic requires that the CTE does not perform a grouped aggregation.
segment_text: DuckDB CTE inlining heuristic requires that the CTE does not perform a grouped aggregation.

claim_paraphrase: DuckDB CTE inlining heuristic requires the CTE not to be referenced more than once.
segment_text: DuckDB CTE inlining heuristic requires the CTE not to be referenced more than once.

claim_paraphrase: DuckDB CTE inlining heuristic requires the CTE not to contain a VOLATILE function.
segment_text: DuckDB CTE inlining heuristic requires the CTE not to contain a VOLATILE function.

claim_paraphrase: DuckDB supports AS NOT MATERIALIZED to disable materialization, subject to optimization constraints.
segment_text: DuckDB supports AS NOT MATERIALIZED to disable materialization, subject to optimization constraints.

claim_paraphrase: DuckDB cannot inline certain CTEs, such as those using read_csv.
segment_text: DuckDB cannot inline certain CTEs, such as those using read_csv.

claim_paraphrase: PostgreSQL GEQO performs heuristic join-order search for many FROM items.
segment_text: PostgreSQL GEQO performs heuristic join-order search for many FROM items.

claim_paraphrase: enable_hashagg controls hash aggregation planning.
segment_text: enable_hashagg controls hash aggregation planning.

claim_paraphrase: enable_hashjoin discourages hash join planning when disabled.
segment_text: enable_hashjoin discourages hash join planning when disabled.

claim_paraphrase: enable_incremental_sort controls incremental sort planning.
segment_text: enable_incremental_sort controls incremental sort planning.

claim_paraphrase: enable_indexscan controls index scan planning.
segment_text: enable_indexscan controls index scan planning.

claim_paraphrase: enable_material controls planner use of materialization.
segment_text: enable_material controls planner use of materialization.

claim_paraphrase: enable_memoize controls memoize planning.
segment_text: enable_memoize controls memoize planning.

claim_paraphrase: enable_mergejoin controls merge join planning.
segment_text: enable_mergejoin controls merge join planning.

claim_paraphrase: enable_nestloop discourages nested loop planning but cannot completely suppress nested loops.
segment_text: enable_nestloop discourages nested loop planning but cannot completely suppress nested loops.

claim_paraphrase: enable_partition_pruning controls plan-time and execution-time partition pruning.
segment_text: enable_partition_pruning controls plan-time and execution-time partition pruning.

claim_paraphrase: enable_partitionwise_aggregate can enable partitionwise aggregation but may increase planning resources.
segment_text: enable_partitionwise_aggregate can enable partitionwise aggregation but may increase planning resources.

claim_paraphrase: enable_partitionwise_join can enable partitionwise join but can increase planning time and memory.
segment_text: enable_partitionwise_join can enable partitionwise join but can increase planning time and memory.

claim_paraphrase: plan_cache_mode controls custom versus generic plans.
segment_text: plan_cache_mode controls custom versus generic plans.

claim_paraphrase: enable_presorted_aggregate controls plans that exploit presorted input for ORDER BY/DISTINCT aggregates.
segment_text: enable_presorted_aggregate controls plans that exploit presorted input for ORDER BY/DISTINCT aggregates.

claim_paraphrase: default_statistics_target affects planner estimate quality.
segment_text: default_statistics_target affects planner estimate quality.

claim_paraphrase: EXPLAIN ANALYZE executes the query and shows actual row counts and runtimes.
segment_text: EXPLAIN ANALYZE executes the query and shows actual row counts and runtimes.

claim_paraphrase: PostgreSQL EXPLAIN cost is expressed in arbitrary units determined by planner cost parameters.
segment_text: PostgreSQL EXPLAIN cost is expressed in arbitrary units determined by planner cost parameters.

claim_paraphrase: PostgreSQL EXPLAIN exposes the planner plan tree and cost estimates; the top node total cost is minimized by the planner.
segment_text: PostgreSQL EXPLAIN exposes the planner plan tree and cost estimates; the top node total cost is minimized by the planner.

claim_paraphrase: PostgreSQL EXPLAIN rows estimates emitted rows, not scanned rows.
segment_text: PostgreSQL EXPLAIN rows estimates emitted rows, not scanned rows.

claim_paraphrase: PostgreSQL switches from exhaustive join-order search to GEQO for sufficiently many joins.
segment_text: PostgreSQL switches from exhaustive join-order search to GEQO for sufficiently many joins.

claim_paraphrase: PostgreSQL EXPLAIN can show a Hash Join physical plan.
segment_text: PostgreSQL EXPLAIN can show a Hash Join physical plan.

claim_paraphrase: PostgreSQL incremental sort can be advantageous when combined with LIMIT.
segment_text: PostgreSQL incremental sort can be advantageous when combined with LIMIT.

claim_paraphrase: PostgreSQL EXPLAIN distinguishes Index Cond predicates from residual Filter predicates in index scans.
segment_text: PostgreSQL EXPLAIN distinguishes Index Cond predicates from residual Filter predicates in index scans.

claim_paraphrase: PostgreSQL can join tables in any order and explores alternative join orders for simple inner-join queries.
segment_text: PostgreSQL can join tables in any order and explores alternative join orders for simple inner-join queries.

claim_paraphrase: Setting join_collapse_limit to 1 forces PostgreSQL to honor explicit JOIN order.
segment_text: Setting join_collapse_limit to 1 forces PostgreSQL to honor explicit JOIN order.

claim_paraphrase: LIMIT can change the plan because the parent Limit node stops after retrieving enough rows.
segment_text: LIMIT can change the plan because the parent Limit node stops after retrieving enough rows.

claim_paraphrase: PostgreSQL can insert a Materialize node in a nested loop plan to avoid repeated inner scans.
segment_text: PostgreSQL can insert a Materialize node in a nested loop plan to avoid repeated inner scans.

claim_paraphrase: PostgreSQL EXPLAIN can show a Merge Join physical plan.
segment_text: PostgreSQL EXPLAIN can show a Merge Join physical plan.

claim_paraphrase: PostgreSQL can use index ordering or explicit Sort/Incremental Sort for ORDER BY queries.
segment_text: PostgreSQL can use index ordering or explicit Sort/Incremental Sort for ORDER BY queries.

claim_paraphrase: Outer joins restrict PostgreSQL join-order freedom compared with inner joins.
segment_text: Outer joins restrict PostgreSQL join-order freedom compared with inner joins.

claim_paraphrase: A filter condition on a sequential scan is represented in EXPLAIN and affects estimated emitted rows.
segment_text: A filter condition on a sequential scan is represented in EXPLAIN and affects estimated emitted rows.

claim_paraphrase: PostgreSQL normally evaluates WITH queries only once even if referenced more than once.
segment_text: PostgreSQL normally evaluates WITH queries only once even if referenced more than once.

claim_paraphrase: Materialization can ensure an expensive function in a WITH query is evaluated only once per row rather than repeatedly.
segment_text: Materialization can ensure an expensive function in a WITH query is evaluated only once per row rather than repeatedly.

claim_paraphrase: A non-recursive side-effect-free WITH query can be folded into the parent query if referenced once.
segment_text: A non-recursive side-effect-free WITH query can be folded into the parent query if referenced once.

claim_paraphrase: PostgreSQL MATERIALIZED prevents folding of a WITH query into the parent query.
segment_text: PostgreSQL MATERIALIZED prevents folding of a WITH query into the parent query.

claim_paraphrase: PostgreSQL NOT MATERIALIZED can force WITH query merging and allow parent restrictions to apply to scans.
segment_text: PostgreSQL NOT MATERIALIZED can force WITH query merging and allow parent restrictions to apply to scans.

claim_paraphrase: For multiply referenced WITH queries, PostgreSQL cannot push parent restrictions into the WITH query.
segment_text: For multiply referenced WITH queries, PostgreSQL cannot push parent restrictions into the WITH query.

claim_paraphrase: Snowflake logical EXPLAIN plan order does not necessarily match actual execution order.
segment_text: Snowflake logical EXPLAIN plan order does not necessarily match actual execution order.

claim_paraphrase: Snowflake assigned partitions and bytes in EXPLAIN are upper-bound estimates and runtime optimizations can reduce actual accesses.
segment_text: Snowflake assigned partitions and bytes in EXPLAIN are upper-bound estimates and runtime optimizations can reduce actual accesses.

claim_paraphrase: Snowflake EXPLAIN compiles the statement but does not execute it and does not require a running warehouse.
segment_text: Snowflake EXPLAIN compiles the statement but does not execute it and does not require a running warehouse.

claim_paraphrase: Snowflake EXPLAIN returns a logical execution plan of operations Snowflake would perform.
segment_text: Snowflake EXPLAIN returns a logical execution plan of operations Snowflake would perform.

claim_paraphrase: Snowflake EXPLAIN output contains operation, objects, expressions, partitions, and bytes columns.
segment_text: Snowflake EXPLAIN output contains operation, objects, expressions, partitions, and bytes columns.

claim_paraphrase: Snowflake GET_QUERY_OPERATOR_STATS returns statistics about individual operators for completed queries in the past 14 days.
segment_text: Snowflake GET_QUERY_OPERATOR_STATS returns statistics about individual operators for completed queries in the past 14 days.

claim_paraphrase: Snowflake operator statistics help understand query structure and identify problem operators.
segment_text: Snowflake operator statistics help understand query structure and identify problem operators.

claim_paraphrase: Snowflake EXPLAIN output may differ depending on warehouse size because warehouse size affects optimization.
segment_text: Snowflake EXPLAIN output may differ depending on warehouse size because warehouse size affects optimization.

claim_paraphrase: Spark SQL AQE can coalesce post-shuffle partitions.
segment_text: Spark SQL AQE can coalesce post-shuffle partitions.

claim_paraphrase: Spark SQL AQE behavior is controlled by spark.sql.adaptive.enabled and can be disabled.
segment_text: Spark SQL AQE behavior is controlled by spark.sql.adaptive.enabled and can be disabled.

claim_paraphrase: Spark SQL AQE can use a local shuffle reader after converting joins.
segment_text: Spark SQL AQE can use a local shuffle reader after converting joins.

claim_paraphrase: Spark SQL adaptive query execution uses runtime statistics and can re-optimize execution plans during query execution.
segment_text: Spark SQL adaptive query execution uses runtime statistics and can re-optimize execution plans during query execution.

claim_paraphrase: Spark SQL AQE can convert sort-merge join to shuffled hash join when partition sizes are small.
segment_text: Spark SQL AQE can convert sort-merge join to shuffled hash join when partition sizes are small.

claim_paraphrase: Spark SQL AQE can split and replicate skewed shuffle partitions for skew join optimization.
segment_text: Spark SQL AQE can split and replicate skewed shuffle partitions for skew join optimization.

claim_paraphrase: Spark SQL AQE can convert sort-merge join to broadcast hash join based on runtime statistics.
segment_text: Spark SQL AQE can convert sort-merge join to broadcast hash join based on runtime statistics.

claim_paraphrase: Spark SQL autoBroadcastJoinThreshold controls automatic broadcast join eligibility.
segment_text: Spark SQL autoBroadcastJoinThreshold controls automatic broadcast join eligibility.

claim_paraphrase: Spark SQL EXPLAIN COST can be used to inspect optimized plan statistics.
segment_text: Spark SQL EXPLAIN COST can be used to inspect optimized plan statistics.

claim_paraphrase: Spark SQL BROADCAST join hint prioritizes broadcast hash join regardless of autoBroadcastJoinThreshold when possible.
segment_text: Spark SQL BROADCAST join hint prioritizes broadcast hash join regardless of autoBroadcastJoinThreshold when possible.

claim_paraphrase: Spark SQL join hints have priority order BROADCAST over MERGE over SHUFFLE_HASH over SHUFFLE_REPLICATE_NL.
segment_text: Spark SQL join hints have priority order BROADCAST over MERGE over SHUFFLE_HASH over SHUFFLE_REPLICATE_NL.

claim_paraphrase: Spark SQL may override or ignore lower-priority join hints and emit a warning.
segment_text: Spark SQL may override or ignore lower-priority join hints and emit a warning.

claim_paraphrase: Spark SQL supports COALESCE, REPARTITION, REPARTITION_BY_RANGE and REBALANCE partitioning hints; multiple hints use the leftmost.
segment_text: Spark SQL supports COALESCE, REPARTITION, REPARTITION_BY_RANGE and REBALANCE partitioning hints; multiple hints use the leftmost.

claim_paraphrase: Spark SQL REBALANCE hint is ignored if AQE is not enabled.
segment_text: Spark SQL REBALANCE hint is ignored if AQE is not enabled.

claim_paraphrase: Spark SQL Storage Partition Join can avoid shuffle and produce a plan without Exchange before the join when performed.
segment_text: Spark SQL Storage Partition Join can avoid shuffle and produce a plan without Exchange before the join when performed.

claim_paraphrase: Spark SQL UI can expose runtime statistics for SQL execution.
segment_text: Spark SQL UI can expose runtime statistics for SQL execution.

claim_paraphrase: Spark SQL statistics can come from data source, catalog, or runtime, and EXPLAIN COST / SQL UI expose statistics.
segment_text: Spark SQL statistics can come from data source, catalog, or runtime, and EXPLAIN COST / SQL UI expose statistics.

claim_paraphrase: Trino adaptive plan optimizations can be disabled through configuration/session properties.
segment_text: Trino adaptive plan optimizations can be disabled through configuration/session properties.

claim_paraphrase: Trino can adaptively reorder partitioned joins based on actual build/probe sizes at runtime.
segment_text: Trino can adaptively reorder partitioned joins based on actual build/probe sizes at runtime.

claim_paraphrase: Trino adaptive plan optimizations dynamically adjust execution plans based on runtime statistics under fault-tolerant execution.
segment_text: Trino adaptive plan optimizations dynamically adjust execution plans based on runtime statistics under fault-tolerant execution.

claim_paraphrase: Aggregation pushdown does not support expressions inside aggregation calls such as sum(a*b).
segment_text: Aggregation pushdown does not support expressions inside aggregation calls such as sum(a*b).

claim_paraphrase: Aggregation pushdown does not support aggregations with filters or ordering.
segment_text: Aggregation pushdown does not support aggregations with filters or ordering.

claim_paraphrase: If an aggregate is pushed down to the connector, the EXPLAIN plan does not show a Trino Aggregate operator for that function.
segment_text: If an aggregate is pushed down to the connector, the EXPLAIN plan does not show a Trino Aggregate operator for that function.

claim_paraphrase: Aggregation pushdown requires connector support for aggregation pushdown, function support, and a query structure that allows pushdown.
segment_text: Aggregation pushdown requires connector support for aggregation pushdown, function support, and a query structure that allows pushdown.

claim_paraphrase: Trino uses connector-provided table statistics to estimate costs for different join orders and selects the lowest computed cost join order.
segment_text: Trino uses connector-provided table statistics to estimate costs for different join orders and selects the lowest computed cost join order.

claim_paraphrase: Dereference pushdown reads only specified fields within a ROW column or nested ROW.
segment_text: Dereference pushdown reads only specified fields within a ROW column or nested ROW.

claim_paraphrase: Trino dynamic filtering collects build-side values and pushes runtime predicates into scans to avoid reading data filtered by joins.
segment_text: Trino dynamic filtering collects build-side values and pushes runtime predicates into scans to avoid reading data filtered by joins.

claim_paraphrase: EXPLAIN ANALYZE can show dynamic filter runtime information.
segment_text: EXPLAIN ANALYZE can show dynamic filter runtime information.

claim_paraphrase: Dynamic filtering is enabled by default but can be disabled globally or per session.
segment_text: Dynamic filtering is enabled by default but can be disabled globally or per session.

claim_paraphrase: EXPLAIN output can show dynamicFilterAssignments and dynamicFilter information for dynamic filtering.
segment_text: EXPLAIN output can show dynamicFilterAssignments and dynamicFilter information for dynamic filtering.

claim_paraphrase: Dynamic filtering requires planner support for the join, connector support, split-enumeration support, and sufficiently small build side.
segment_text: Dynamic filtering requires planner support for the join, connector support, split-enumeration support, and sufficiently small build side.

claim_paraphrase: Trino caps the replicated table size for broadcast joins to avoid bad plans when costs are misestimated.
segment_text: Trino caps the replicated table size for broadcast joins to avoid bad plans when costs are misestimated.

claim_paraphrase: Trino can automatically choose between broadcast and partitioned join distribution based on cost.
segment_text: Trino can automatically choose between broadcast and partitioned join distribution based on cost.

claim_paraphrase: With cost-based join enumeration, Trino can automatically enumerate join orders using connector statistics.
segment_text: With cost-based join enumeration, Trino can automatically enumerate join orders using connector statistics.

claim_paraphrase: If statistics are unavailable or a cost cannot be computed, Trino falls back to eliminate-cross-joins strategy.
segment_text: If statistics are unavailable or a cost cannot be computed, Trino falls back to eliminate-cross-joins strategy.

claim_paraphrase: Trino exposes a NONE join reordering strategy in which no join reordering is performed.
segment_text: Trino exposes a NONE join reordering strategy in which no join reordering is performed.

claim_paraphrase: Join pushdown delegates table join operations to the data source when predicates are pushdownable and joined tables come from the same catalog.
segment_text: Join pushdown delegates table join operations to the data source when predicates are pushdownable and joined tables come from the same catalog.

claim_paraphrase: If a join is pushed down to the source, the EXPLAIN plan does not show a Trino Join operator.
segment_text: If a join is pushed down to the source, the EXPLAIN plan does not show a Trino Join operator.

claim_paraphrase: Limit pushdown allows connectors to apply LIMIT during data retrieval and is connector-specific.
segment_text: Limit pushdown allows connectors to apply LIMIT during data retrieval and is connector-specific.

claim_paraphrase: Successful predicate pushdown is observable by absence of a ScanFilterProject operation for that clause in EXPLAIN.
segment_text: Successful predicate pushdown is observable by absence of a ScanFilterProject operation for that clause in EXPLAIN.

claim_paraphrase: Predicate pushdown pushes inferred filters to the data source; successful predicate pushdown removes the corresponding ScanFilterProject operation from EXPLAIN.
segment_text: Predicate pushdown pushes inferred filters to the data source; successful predicate pushdown removes the corresponding ScanFilterProject operation from EXPLAIN.

claim_paraphrase: Projection pushdown restricts source access to relevant columns and is observable in the Layout of the TableScan operation.
segment_text: Projection pushdown restricts source access to relevant columns and is observable in the Layout of the TableScan operation.

claim_paraphrase: Trino can push parts of query processing into a connected data source, and support is specific to each connector and source.
segment_text: Trino can push parts of query processing into a connected data source, and support is specific to each connector and source.

claim_paraphrase: When cost-based join enumeration is not used, syntactic join order can determine distribution behavior, but this is not a guaranteed feature.
segment_text: When cost-based join enumeration is not used, syntactic join order can determine distribution behavior, but this is not a guaranteed feature.

claim_paraphrase: Top-N pushdown applies ORDER BY with LIMIT at the source and differs from plain LIMIT pushdown.
segment_text: Top-N pushdown applies ORDER BY with LIMIT at the source and differs from plain LIMIT pushdown.

claim_paraphrase: enable_async_append exposes async-aware append plan types.
segment_text: enable_async_append exposes async-aware append plan types.

claim_paraphrase: enable_bitmapscan exposes bitmap-scan plan types.
segment_text: enable_bitmapscan exposes bitmap-scan plan types.

claim_paraphrase: enable_distinct_reordering controls reordering DISTINCT keys to match input pathkeys.
segment_text: enable_distinct_reordering controls reordering DISTINCT keys to match input pathkeys.

claim_paraphrase: enable_gathermerge exposes gather merge plan types.
segment_text: enable_gathermerge exposes gather merge plan types.

claim_paraphrase: enable_group_by_reordering lets planner produce plans sorted by child pathkeys for GROUP BY keys.
segment_text: enable_group_by_reordering lets planner produce plans sorted by child pathkeys for GROUP BY keys.

claim_paraphrase: enable_hashagg exposes hashed aggregation plan types.
segment_text: enable_hashagg exposes hashed aggregation plan types.

claim_paraphrase: enable_hashjoin exposes hash-join plan types.
segment_text: enable_hashjoin exposes hash-join plan types.

claim_paraphrase: enable_incremental_sort exposes incremental sort steps.
segment_text: enable_incremental_sort exposes incremental sort steps.

claim_paraphrase: enable_indexscan exposes index-scan and index-only-scan plan types.
segment_text: enable_indexscan exposes index-scan and index-only-scan plan types.

claim_paraphrase: enable_indexonlyscan exposes index-only-scan plan types and depends on indexscan enablement.
segment_text: enable_indexonlyscan exposes index-only-scan plan types and depends on indexscan enablement.

claim_paraphrase: enable_material controls planner use of materialization, except when materialization is required for correctness.
segment_text: enable_material controls planner use of materialization, except when materialization is required for correctness.

claim_paraphrase: enable_memoize exposes memoize plans for parameterized scans inside nested-loop joins.
segment_text: enable_memoize exposes memoize plans for parameterized scans inside nested-loop joins.

claim_paraphrase: enable_mergejoin exposes merge-join plan types.
segment_text: enable_mergejoin exposes merge-join plan types.

claim_paraphrase: enable_nestloop exposes nested-loop join plans, although disabling cannot suppress them entirely.
segment_text: enable_nestloop exposes nested-loop join plans, although disabling cannot suppress them entirely.

claim_paraphrase: enable_parallel_append exposes parallel-aware append plan types.
segment_text: enable_parallel_append exposes parallel-aware append plan types.

claim_paraphrase: enable_parallel_hash exposes hash-join plan types with parallel hash when hash joins are enabled.
segment_text: enable_parallel_hash exposes hash-join plan types with parallel hash when hash joins are enabled.

claim_paraphrase: enable_partition_pruning controls planner ability to eliminate partitions from query plans.
segment_text: enable_partition_pruning controls planner ability to eliminate partitions from query plans.

claim_paraphrase: enable_partition_pruning also controls plans that let the executor remove partitions during execution.
segment_text: enable_partition_pruning also controls plans that let the executor remove partitions during execution.

claim_paraphrase: enable_partitionwise_join allows joining matching partitions under partition-key conditions.
segment_text: enable_partitionwise_join allows joining matching partitions under partition-key conditions.

claim_paraphrase: enable_partitionwise_aggregate allows per-partition grouping or aggregation.
segment_text: enable_partitionwise_aggregate allows per-partition grouping or aggregation.

claim_paraphrase: enable_presorted_aggregate lets planner use presorted input for ORDER BY or DISTINCT aggregates.
segment_text: enable_presorted_aggregate lets planner use presorted input for ORDER BY or DISTINCT aggregates.

claim_paraphrase: enable_self_join_elimination controls replacing self joins with semantically equivalent single scans.
segment_text: enable_self_join_elimination controls replacing self joins with semantically equivalent single scans.

claim_paraphrase: enable_seqscan exposes sequential scan plan types and disabling only discourages them.
segment_text: enable_seqscan exposes sequential scan plan types and disabling only discourages them.

claim_paraphrase: enable_sort exposes explicit sort steps and disabling only discourages them.
segment_text: enable_sort exposes explicit sort steps and disabling only discourages them.

claim_paraphrase: Planner cost variables are measured on an arbitrary scale; only relative values matter.
segment_text: Planner cost variables are measured on an arbitrary scale; only relative values matter.

claim_paraphrase: random_page_cost affects estimated cost of non-sequential page fetches and index-scan preference.
segment_text: random_page_cost affects estimated cost of non-sequential page fetches and index-scan preference.

claim_paraphrase: effective_cache_size factors into estimates for using an index but does not reserve cache.
segment_text: effective_cache_size factors into estimates for using an index but does not reserve cache.

claim_paraphrase: cursor_tuple_fraction biases the planner toward fast-start versus total-cost cursor plans.
segment_text: cursor_tuple_fraction biases the planner toward fast-start versus total-cost cursor plans.

claim_paraphrase: from_collapse_limit controls subquery merging and may trigger GEQO when set high.
segment_text: from_collapse_limit controls subquery merging and may trigger GEQO when set high.

claim_paraphrase: join_collapse_limit controls rewriting explicit JOIN constructs and setting it to 1 preserves explicit join order.
segment_text: join_collapse_limit controls rewriting explicit JOIN constructs and setting it to 1 preserves explicit join order.

claim_paraphrase: plan_cache_mode controls custom versus generic plans and is considered at cached-plan execution.
segment_text: plan_cache_mode controls custom versus generic plans and is considered at cached-plan execution.

claim_paraphrase: A non-recursive side-effect-free WITH query can be folded into the parent when referenced once.
segment_text: A non-recursive side-effect-free WITH query can be folded into the parent when referenced once.

claim_paraphrase: A side-effect-free WITH query referenced more than once is not folded by default.
segment_text: A side-effect-free WITH query referenced more than once is not folded by default.

claim_paraphrase: MATERIALIZED can override the default and force separate calculation of the WITH query.
segment_text: MATERIALIZED can override the default and force separate calculation of the WITH query.

claim_paraphrase: NOT MATERIALIZED can force merging into the parent and allow parent restrictions to apply directly.
segment_text: NOT MATERIALIZED can force merging into the parent and allow parent restrictions to apply directly.

claim_paraphrase: A materialized multi-reference WITH query can prevent index use, while NOT MATERIALIZED can allow restrictions to apply to scans.
segment_text: A materialized multi-reference WITH query can prevent index use, while NOT MATERIALIZED can allow restrictions to apply to scans.

claim_paraphrase: Materialization can avoid evaluating an expensive function twice in a reused WITH query.
segment_text: Materialization can avoid evaluating an expensive function twice in a reused WITH query.

claim_paraphrase: Trino AUTOMATIC join reordering enumerates possible orders and uses statistics-based cost estimation.
segment_text: Trino AUTOMATIC join reordering enumerates possible orders and uses statistics-based cost estimation.

claim_paraphrase: Trino NONE join reordering strategy maintains the listed table order.
segment_text: Trino NONE join reordering strategy maintains the listed table order.

claim_paraphrase: ELIMINATE_CROSS_JOINS reorders joins to eliminate cross joins where possible.
segment_text: ELIMINATE_CROSS_JOINS reorders joins to eliminate cross joins where possible.

claim_paraphrase: max_reordered_joins bounds how many joins can be reordered when cost-based join reordering is used.
segment_text: max_reordered_joins bounds how many joins can be reordered when cost-based join reordering is used.

claim_paraphrase: Trino can reduce rows produced by joins when duplicated join output rows can be skipped.
segment_text: Trino can reduce rows produced by joins when duplicated join output rows can be skipped.

claim_paraphrase: Trino can repartition data unless upstream partitioning exactly matches downstream stage expectations.
segment_text: Trino can repartition data unless upstream partitioning exactly matches downstream stage expectations.

claim_paraphrase: Trino can use connector-provided table node partitioning and distribute partition readers across workers.
segment_text: Trino can use connector-provided table node partitioning and distribute partition readers across workers.

claim_paraphrase: Trino can use co-located joins when both sides have matching table partitioning and conditions are met.
segment_text: Trino can use co-located joins when both sides have matching table partitioning and conditions are met.

claim_paraphrase: Trino exposes a filter-conjunction independence factor that affects selectivity estimates.
segment_text: Trino exposes a filter-conjunction independence factor that affects selectivity estimates.

claim_paraphrase: Trino exposes a join multi-clause independence factor for estimating multi-clause join output.
segment_text: Trino exposes a join multi-clause independence factor for estimating multi-clause join output.

claim_paraphrase: Trino can approximate output row count for filters whose costs cannot be accurately estimated.
segment_text: Trino can approximate output row count for filters whose costs cannot be accurately estimated.

claim_paraphrase: Trino can choose single-threaded join lookup when the estimated join build side is below a configured threshold.
segment_text: Trino can choose single-threaded join lookup when the estimated join build side is below a configured threshold.

claim_paraphrase: Trino uses minimum input size per task to determine hash partition count for joins and aggregations.
segment_text: Trino uses minimum input size per task to determine hash partition count for joins and aggregations.

claim_paraphrase: Trino uses minimum input rows per task to determine hash partition count for joins and aggregations.
segment_text: Trino uses minimum input rows per task to determine hash partition count for joins and aggregations.

claim_paraphrase: Trino cost-based optimizer can determine whether repartitioning an already partitioned stage output is necessary.
segment_text: Trino cost-based optimizer can determine whether repartitioning an already partitioned stage output is necessary.

claim_paraphrase: Dynamic filtering is enabled by default and can be disabled by configuration or session property.
segment_text: Dynamic filtering is enabled by default and can be disabled by configuration or session property.

claim_paraphrase: Dynamic filtering can be disabled through configuration or session property.
segment_text: Dynamic filtering can be disabled through configuration or session property.

claim_paraphrase: Dynamic filtering is currently planned for inner/right joins with comparison predicates and semi-joins with IN conditions.
segment_text: Dynamic filtering is currently planned for inner/right joins with comparison predicates and semi-joins with IN conditions.

claim_paraphrase: Dynamic filter utilization at table scan runtime depends on connector support.
segment_text: Dynamic filter utilization at table scan runtime depends on connector support.

claim_paraphrase: EXPLAIN can show dynamicFilterAssignments in an InnerJoin and dynamicFilters in ScanFilterProject.
segment_text: EXPLAIN can show dynamicFilterAssignments in an InnerJoin and dynamicFilters in ScanFilterProject.

claim_paraphrase: Trino reports dynamic filter statistics in QueryInfo dynamicFiltersStats.
segment_text: Trino reports dynamic filter statistics in QueryInfo dynamicFiltersStats.

claim_paraphrase: Operator statistics can show dynamicFilterSplitsProcessed after pushdown to table scan.
segment_text: Operator statistics can show dynamicFilterSplitsProcessed after pushdown to table scan.

claim_paraphrase: Dynamic filtering requires choosing the smaller dimension table as join build side, which the CBO can do from connector statistics.
segment_text: Dynamic filtering requires choosing the smaller dimension table as join build side, which the CBO can do from connector statistics.

claim_paraphrase: Spark COALESCE hint suggests reducing output partitions.
segment_text: Spark COALESCE hint suggests reducing output partitions.

claim_paraphrase: Spark REPARTITION hint suggests repartitioning by partition number or expressions.
segment_text: Spark REPARTITION hint suggests repartitioning by partition number or expressions.

claim_paraphrase: Spark REPARTITION_BY_RANGE hint suggests range repartitioning by expressions.
segment_text: Spark REPARTITION_BY_RANGE hint suggests range repartitioning by expressions.

claim_paraphrase: Spark REBALANCE hint is best-effort and may split skewed partitions, but is ignored if AQE is disabled.
segment_text: Spark REBALANCE hint is best-effort and may split skewed partitions, but is ignored if AQE is disabled.

claim_paraphrase: Spark REBALANCE hint is ignored when AQE is not enabled.
segment_text: Spark REBALANCE hint is ignored when AQE is not enabled.

claim_paraphrase: When multiple partitioning hints are specified, Spark inserts multiple nodes but optimizer picks the leftmost hint.
segment_text: When multiple partitioning hints are specified, Spark inserts multiple nodes but optimizer picks the leftmost hint.

claim_paraphrase: Spark BROADCAST join hint suggests broadcast join and can broadcast regardless of autoBroadcastJoinThreshold.
segment_text: Spark BROADCAST join hint suggests broadcast join and can broadcast regardless of autoBroadcastJoinThreshold.

claim_paraphrase: Spark MERGE hint suggests shuffle sort merge join.
segment_text: Spark MERGE hint suggests shuffle sort merge join.

claim_paraphrase: Spark SHUFFLE_HASH hint suggests shuffle hash join and can choose smaller side from statistics.
segment_text: Spark SHUFFLE_HASH hint suggests shuffle hash join and can choose smaller side from statistics.

claim_paraphrase: Spark SHUFFLE_REPLICATE_NL hint suggests shuffle-and-replicate nested loop join.
segment_text: Spark SHUFFLE_REPLICATE_NL hint suggests shuffle-and-replicate nested loop join.

claim_paraphrase: Spark prioritizes BROADCAST over MERGE over SHUFFLE_HASH over SHUFFLE_REPLICATE_NL when hints conflict.
segment_text: Spark prioritizes BROADCAST over MERGE over SHUFFLE_HASH over SHUFFLE_REPLICATE_NL when hints conflict.

claim_paraphrase: Spark is not guaranteed to use a hinted join strategy if the strategy does not support the join type.
segment_text: Spark is not guaranteed to use a hinted join strategy if the strategy does not support the join type.

claim_paraphrase: When both sides have broadcast or shuffle-hash hints, Spark picks build side based on join type and relation sizes.
segment_text: When both sides have broadcast or shuffle-hash hints, Spark picks build side based on join type and relation sizes.

claim_paraphrase: With Storage Partition Join, Spark query plan does not contain Exchange nodes prior to the join.
segment_text: With Storage Partition Join, Spark query plan does not contain Exchange nodes prior to the join.

claim_paraphrase: Spark can try to avoid shuffle when compatible V2 data source partitioning is reported.
segment_text: Spark can try to avoid shuffle when compatible V2 data source partitioning is reported.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery query plan stages expose input stage dependencies and detailed execution steps.
segment_text: BigQuery query plan stages expose input stage dependencies and detailed execution steps.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery stage statistics expose records read, records written, and parallel input completion.
segment_text: BigQuery stage statistics expose records read, records written, and parallel input completion.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery exposes shuffle output bytes and spilled shuffle bytes in stage statistics.
segment_text: BigQuery exposes shuffle output bytes and spilled shuffle bytes in stage statistics.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery query-plan steps include READ operations and read column detail.
segment_text: BigQuery query-plan steps include READ operations and read column detail.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery WRITE step can include hash partitioned output and partition key columns.
segment_text: BigQuery WRITE step can include hash partitioned output and partition key columns.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery query-plan steps include FILTER operations for WHERE, OMIT IF, and HAVING clauses.
segment_text: BigQuery query-plan steps include FILTER operations for WHERE, OMIT IF, and HAVING clauses.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery query-plan steps include SORT operations for ORDER BY.
segment_text: BigQuery query-plan steps include SORT operations for ORDER BY.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery query-plan steps include AGGREGATE operations for GROUP BY or COUNT.
segment_text: BigQuery query-plan steps include AGGREGATE operations for GROUP BY or COUNT.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery query-plan steps include LIMIT operations.
segment_text: BigQuery query-plan steps include LIMIT operations.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery query-plan steps include user-defined function invocations.
segment_text: BigQuery query-plan steps include user-defined function invocations.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery READ step can read from shuffle memory when reading from a previous stage.
segment_text: BigQuery READ step can read from shuffle memory when reading from a previous stage.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery WRITE step often sends intermediate data to shuffle memory in multi-stage queries.
segment_text: BigQuery WRITE step often sends intermediate data to shuffle memory in multi-stage queries.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery join step documentation describes broadcast joins when a small table can fit in memory on workers.
segment_text: BigQuery join step documentation describes broadcast joins when a small table can fit in memory on workers.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery describes hash joins using shuffle operations for large-table joins.
segment_text: BigQuery describes hash joins using shuffle operations for large-table joins.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery query plans can expose skewed join symptoms through max compute time much larger than average.
segment_text: BigQuery query plans can expose skewed join symptoms through max compute time much larger than average.

claim_paraphrase: BigQuery documentation states SQL query optimizer can determine which table should be on which side of the join.
segment_text: BigQuery documentation states SQL query optimizer can determine which table should be on which side of the join.

claim_paraphrase: Snowflake EXPLAIN returns logical plan operations including table scans and joins and lists operation expressions.
segment_text: Snowflake EXPLAIN returns logical plan operations including table scans and joins and lists operation expressions.

claim_paraphrase: Snowflake EXPLAIN includes partitionsAssigned and bytesAssigned estimates after compile-time pruning.
segment_text: Snowflake EXPLAIN includes partitionsAssigned and bytesAssigned estimates after compile-time pruning.

claim_paraphrase: Snowflake EXPLAIN compiles but does not execute and can depend on warehouse size.
segment_text: Snowflake EXPLAIN compiles but does not execute and can depend on warehouse size.

claim_paraphrase: Snowflake notes runtime optimizations such as join pruning can reduce partitions and bytes scanned relative to EXPLAIN estimates.
segment_text: Snowflake notes runtime optimizations such as join pruning can reduce partitions and bytes scanned relative to EXPLAIN estimates.

claim_paraphrase: Snowflake query profile TableScan attributes include scanned columns and access predicates.
segment_text: Snowflake query profile TableScan attributes include scanned columns and access predicates.

claim_paraphrase: Snowflake query profile IndexScan attributes include index columns and access predicates.
segment_text: Snowflake query profile IndexScan attributes include index columns and access predicates.

claim_paraphrase: Snowflake query profile Filter node exposes filter condition.
segment_text: Snowflake query profile Filter node exposes filter condition.

claim_paraphrase: Snowflake query profile Join node exposes join type, equality join condition, and additional conditions.
segment_text: Snowflake query profile Join node exposes join type, equality join condition, and additional conditions.

claim_paraphrase: Snowflake query profile Aggregate node exposes grouping keys and aggregate functions.
segment_text: Snowflake query profile Aggregate node exposes grouping keys and aggregate functions.

claim_paraphrase: Snowflake query profile WindowFunction node exposes window functions.
segment_text: Snowflake query profile WindowFunction node exposes window functions.

claim_paraphrase: Snowflake query profile Sort node exposes sort keys.
segment_text: Snowflake query profile Sort node exposes sort keys.

claim_paraphrase: Snowflake query profile SortWithLimit node represents ORDER BY with LIMIT/OFFSET.
segment_text: Snowflake query profile SortWithLimit node represents ORDER BY with LIMIT/OFFSET.

claim_paraphrase: GET_QUERY_OPERATOR_STATS example exposes Sort operator with input/output rows and sort keys.
segment_text: GET_QUERY_OPERATOR_STATS example exposes Sort operator with input/output rows and sort keys.

claim_paraphrase: GET_QUERY_OPERATOR_STATS example exposes Join operator rows, equality condition, and join type.
segment_text: GET_QUERY_OPERATOR_STATS example exposes Join operator rows, equality condition, and join type.

claim_paraphrase: GET_QUERY_OPERATOR_STATS example exposes TableScan operator IO and columns.
segment_text: GET_QUERY_OPERATOR_STATS example exposes TableScan operator IO and columns.

claim_paraphrase: DuckDB handles regular CTEs as materialized by default, evaluating once and storing a temporary table.
segment_text: DuckDB handles regular CTEs as materialized by default, evaluating once and storing a temporary table.

claim_paraphrase: DuckDB inlining heuristic requires the CTE not be referenced more than once.
segment_text: DuckDB inlining heuristic requires the CTE not be referenced more than once.

claim_paraphrase: DuckDB inlining heuristic requires the CTE not contain a VOLATILE function.
segment_text: DuckDB inlining heuristic requires the CTE not contain a VOLATILE function.

claim_paraphrase: DuckDB can use AS NOT MATERIALIZED as an inlining heuristic and explicit control.
segment_text: DuckDB can use AS NOT MATERIALIZED as an inlining heuristic and explicit control.

claim_paraphrase: DuckDB inlining heuristic requires the CTE not perform grouped aggregation.
segment_text: DuckDB inlining heuristic requires the CTE not perform grouped aggregation.

claim_paraphrase: DuckDB can explicitly activate materialization with AS MATERIALIZED.
segment_text: DuckDB can explicitly activate materialization with AS MATERIALIZED.

claim_paraphrase: DuckDB notes inlining is not always possible even when heuristics are met, for example read_csv CTEs.
segment_text: DuckDB notes inlining is not always possible even when heuristics are met, for example read_csv CTEs.

claim_paraphrase: DuckDB example explains materializing an expensive reused CTE evaluates it only once.
segment_text: DuckDB example explains materializing an expensive reused CTE evaluates it only once.

claim_paraphrase: DuckDB says NOT MATERIALIZED can disable materialization but explicit materialization hints are generally not recommended.
segment_text: DuckDB says NOT MATERIALIZED can disable materialization but explicit materialization hints are generally not recommended.

claim_paraphrase: ClickHouse PREWHERE filters irrelevant data before reading non-filter columns from disk.
segment_text: ClickHouse PREWHERE filters irrelevant data before reading non-filter columns from disk.

claim_paraphrase: ClickHouse PREWHERE example uses the primary index to identify relevant granules before loading aligned columns.
segment_text: ClickHouse PREWHERE example uses the primary index to identify relevant granules before loading aligned columns.

claim_paraphrase: ClickHouse data skipping indexes target cases where primary key cannot efficiently support WHERE predicates.
segment_text: ClickHouse data skipping indexes target cases where primary key cannot efficiently support WHERE predicates.

claim_paraphrase: ClickHouse can convert hash join to grace hash join to spill right-side data when memory ratio threshold is reached.
segment_text: ClickHouse can convert hash join to grace hash join to spill right-side data when memory ratio threshold is reached.

claim_paraphrase: ClickHouse uses external sort when ORDER BY memory threshold is reached.
segment_text: ClickHouse uses external sort when ORDER BY memory threshold is reached.

claim_paraphrase: ClickHouse max_bytes_to_read_leaf limits leaf-node reads in distributed queries.
segment_text: ClickHouse max_bytes_to_read_leaf limits leaf-node reads in distributed queries.

claim_paraphrase: ClickHouse max_execution_time logic can interrupt a query if projected execution time exceeds the setting.
segment_text: ClickHouse max_execution_time logic can interrupt a query if projected execution time exceeds the setting.

claim_paraphrase: ClickHouse by default uses direct or hash join based on join type, strictness, and table engine.
segment_text: ClickHouse by default uses direct or hash join based on join type, strictness, and table engine.

claim_paraphrase: With join_algorithm=auto, ClickHouse tries hash join first and switches to partial merge join on memory limit violation.
segment_text: With join_algorithm=auto, ClickHouse tries hash join first and switches to partial merge join on memory limit violation.

claim_paraphrase: ClickHouse can observe chosen join algorithm via trace logging.
segment_text: ClickHouse can observe chosen join algorithm via trace logging.

claim_paraphrase: ClickHouse join guide shows adding filters to both join sides or rewriting to a subquery can improve execution.
segment_text: ClickHouse join guide shows adding filters to both join sides or rewriting to a subquery can improve execution.
